name: Steadfast
tagline: No ads. No account. Just fast.
metaDescription: No ads. No account. Just fast. Steadfast is a private, offline-first intermittent fasting timer for iOS.

features.title: Intermittent Fasting Timer
features.description: Track your fasts with a clean, distraction-free timer. Supports all popular schedules — 16:8, 18:6, 20:4, OMAD, and custom plans.

features.title: Weight & Water Tracking
features.description: Log your weight and daily water intake. Integrates with Apple Health so your data stays in sync.

features.title: 100% Private & Offline
features.description: All data lives on your device. No analytics, no tracking SDKs, no account required. Your health data is yours alone.

features.title: iCloud Sync
features.description: Optionally sync across your devices with iCloud. Your data stays in your personal Apple account — we never see it.

newsletterPrompt: Occasional notes on Steadfast updates — and nothing else.
